title: eriastrum wilcoxii
intro: Eriastrum wilcoxii, also known as Wilcox's Buckwheat or Wilcox's Buckwheat Clarkia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), while its herbal preparations often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and roots. However, more research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential medicinal applications and to confirm its safety for human consumption.
